zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Conyers於1383年出生在英國越可爾宏比 卡素時，他的父親Sir John Conyers18歲，母親Margaret St. Quintin22歲。他於大約1416年與Ellyn Rolleston結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年6月8日在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾宏比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Conyers于1383年出生在英国越可爾宏比 卡素时，他的父亲Sir John Conyers18岁，母亲Margaret St. Quintin22岁。他于大约1416年与Ellyn Rolleston结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年6月8日在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾宏比。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Conyers was born in 1383, in Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Conyers, was 18 and his mother, Margaret St. Quintin, was 22. He married Ellyn Rolleston about 1416. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 8 June 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Hornby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Conyers est né en 1383, à Hornby Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Conyers, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret St. Quintin, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ellyn Rolleston environ 1416. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Hornby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Conyers 1383 in Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Conyers 18 und seine Mutter Margaret St. Quintin 22. Er hat um 1416 Ellyn Rolleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1456 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hornby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Conyers è nato il nel 1383 nel Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Conyers, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Margaret St. Quintin, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ellyn Rolleston circa 1416. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Hornby, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Conyersが1383年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Conyersは18歳，母Margaret St. Quintinは22歳であった。約1416年にEllyn Rollestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年6月8日に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアホールンビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Conyers(이)가 1383년 영국 요르크실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Conyers(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret St. Quintin(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1416년 Ellyn Rolleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 호른비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Conyers nasceu em 1383, em Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Conyers, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret St. Quintin, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellyn Rolleston aproximadamente 1416. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Hornby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Conyers родился в 1383 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Conyers было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret St. Quintin, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellyn Rolleston около 1416 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 8 июня 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ellyn Rolleston aproximadamente 1416. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Hornby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
